author: lOrm
content: Partially addressed: max_iterations is now config-driven via a new src/config/acp.rs AcpConfig with two sources — YAML acp.max_iterations key in .openclaudia/config.yaml and OPENCLAUDIA_ACP_MAX_ITERATIONS env var override (rejects zero/garbage). Default 50 matches the previous hard-coded value, no behavioural change without configuration. acp::run_prompt_loop now also threads cwd via build_system_prompt_with_cwd instead of dropping it. AcpConfig is loaded lazily inside run_prompt_loop rather than stored on AppConfig because the AppConfig struct literal is constructed in several forbidden test-fixture sites (subagent.rs / vdd/) that this change-set cannot touch. The function-split / pooled-client refactor in the mandate is out of scope here — the loop-cap and prompt-builder gaps (the two concrete leaks the issue names) are closed; leaving issue open for the structural refactor work.
